environment: mac-dev podman v3 QUIC public rf/rfd path (NOT Linux production SLO)

public_object_capacity_16m_sustained_fix.summary: SDK re-stamps a fresh signed_request auth window (created_at/expires_at) per gateway request via build_gateway_signed_request -> refresh_auth_window, so a persistent gateway session no longer carries a frozen connect-time deadline. No wire/TTL/gateway-expiry/replay change.
public_object_capacity_16m_sustained_fix.post_fix_evidence: C16M a2fix_c16m_full_run0 (release, K=1 8obj/round x5): 40/40 ops errors=[], single persistent session reused 43178x, relay HTTP object=0, relay memcurrent 443.3 MiB, fd stable 25, signed_request_expired=0. Independent churn-less rerun a2fix_c16m_run0 also 40/40. Root cause located by GW-TOKEN-01-A0 (frozen session deadline = connect + GATEWAY_SESSION_AUTH_TTL_SECONDS=300).

public_object_capacity_16m_sustained_his.observed_failure_certain: C16M K=1 8obj/round x5 deterministically (2/2) failed at the gateway signed_request freshness window under sustained 16MiB load (session-frozen created_at/expires_at); first 14+ 16MiB objects committed byte-identical.

churn_reconnect_gate_note: Large-object churn hard gate is now E_churn_reconnect_overhead_le_15s = max(0, first_op - warm_p95_pre); measured 9966ms (first_op 19050ms - warm_p95_pre 9084ms) PASS. The raw E_churn_first_op_lt_15s was mis-scoped for 16MiB (one warm PUT ~9s) and is retained DIAGNOSTIC-only (first_op=19050ms, superseded) for large objects; the 64KiB default churn keeps the original raw first_op gate.
no_regression: B512/B1M post-fix smoke (a2fix_b_smoke_run0, K=1): 20/20 each, relay HTTP object=0. s69 object-ipc crash-resume realnet green.
follow_up_card: GW-TOKEN-01-A2 (fix; C16M mac-dev sustained gate closed). Linux QA/production SLO re-test remains separate.
